message:
feat(tui): expand dashboard panels with improved alerts, beads view, layout, and perf tracking

- Expand alerts panel with additional severity filtering and rendering
- Expand beads panel with improved issue display and status formatting
- Expand layout with additional panel arrangement logic
- Expand local perf tracking
- Dashboard minor additions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
